description: Accounts with Arabic numerals, highly detailed and well-preserved. All of the columns list sums in Ottoman kurush (ق symbol) which helps to date this document as 18th- or 19th-century. Further examination required for content.
tags: 18th or 19th c, numismatic dating, Late JA
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
